attributes.name: Danielle Colby Striptease Historian | The Queen of Rust
attributes.summary:
The Queen of Rust


As an artist, I value what I create and enjoy sharing it with others. Art is subjective, and I enjoy that my content and inspirations vary. By donating to this Patreon page, you are paying it forward to the artists and the people that are doing the work and have the passion. I will continue to create, but have streamlined the tiers and hopefully rid expectations.

I consider the money I have generated through Patreon as shared wealth. My mission is to set a model that can be followed in the artistic community, for people that are learning and thriving and want to see others thrive and be successful.
What this page brings in, goes back into the artistic community or Puerto Rican communities. This includes reparations, performers that deserve opportunities, relief supplies, and further education for people.

Living in Puerto Rico has taught me about the importance of community in so many ways. Which I apply to by helping my physical neighbors and local neighborhoods, along with other sex workers, dancers, performers, vintage enthusiasts, and the arts.
I welcome you to join me on this wild ride of loving and supporting people through arts and entertainment, through relief work and educating ourselves about different industries, cultures, and the world at large...

"My work on American Pickers reflects my real life passion for history. The beauty lies in the story. With out a back story there is little value to vintage. From our past we learn where to direct our present and future humanitarian efforts. This is the mentality that keeps me searching for answers and back stories that will help nurture the human spirit and at times allow us to sit in quiet reflection with the more macabre side of history… The darker side we tend to forget or neatly tuck away out of sight. My goal is to bring to light all sides of history, lay them out in front of you, the viewer and allow you to become an involved steward of history yourself".

- Danielle Colby

attributes.name: Fenoxo Fenfen
attributes.summary:
Splash art created by Uthstar01 (His NSFW gallery can be found here).

About Tainted Space
Trials in Tainted Space is a free text game about exploring the universe, yourself, and its myriad inhabitants in fun and customizeable ways. Because the entire game is made in text, it's easy to change scenes on the fly. The game is built to accommodate everything from you playing a studly ship captain to a busty space-slattern to a masculine-looking hermaphrodite to a hard-working mercenary just looking for his next job.

You can find the game's website at fenoxo.com.  There you can check out the latest patch notes, development diaries, and my own personal ramblings. Free monthly alphas are posted there as well, if you'd like to try out my games. Keep in mind that Patreon supporters and Offbeatr backers get access to new builds and new content far more than once a month. Patreon supporters can grab their special builds under the "Creations" tab on Patreon.com or directly from my website by linking their Patreon account and clicking the "Backer Builds" link on fenoxo.com.

Why Should I Support You, And What Will I Get For It?
Well, I would hope you'd be supporting it because you like what I'm doing and want me to keep doing it as long as possible, but if that isn't the case, you'll still get early access to pre-release alpha builds until we eventually release. I'm also going to churn out a monthly story that'll be exclusive to patreon backers. Note that as I'm still experimenting with Patreon I may not be able to easily/quickly flag you as a backer on the game's website, but new Alphas WILL be shared with Patreon folks one way or another.

Once I do release the game and everyone starts being able to enjoy it at the same time, I'll be coming up with some alternatives to make sure you all get your money's worth!

attributes.name: HDVinnie
attributes.summary:
https://github.com/HDInnovations

Current Projects:

Development:
UNIT3D-HiFi (Private)
BitBox (Private)
BluFLIX (Private)

Released:
UNIT3D (Open Source)



Why a Patreon?

Since I have pretty much been working full-time on these projects. I devoted my full attention to making this delightful open source software. However, it is very time consuming and this can't continue forever without your support.

I’m not affiliated with any company (getting paid to code), so I'm counting on your support to enable me to keep writing code and maintaining these projects.

I'm raising funds on Patreon so I can devote more time to HDInnvations projects. I'd love to be able to devote all my time to maintaining/upgrading current projects 😇 as well as adding new features and maintaining current ones ✨.

Why donate?

Your donation will enable me to continue releasing new projects and continue updating/maintaining current ones.

"Put your money where your love is." – The Grateful Dead

Your donation also makes a clear statement:
You value the work I do. You understand its time consuming and is not a easy task.


Note:

Some folks have asked me if it's possible to do a one-time donation, or if I accept cryptocurrency. Yes, and yes!

attributes.name: Corruption of Champions
attributes.summary:
Corruption of Champions II is a text-based roleplaying game focused on romance and adventure in a world that's on the cusp of falling prey to a seductive demon queen -- and she's got her sights set on claiming your soul above all others.

You'll be accompanied on your perverse adventures by a group of eclectic companions, from catgirl clerics and kitsune sorceresses, to chastity-bound elf princesses and domineering orc amazons. You can lead these companions against a world full of lustful enemies and corrupted magics, building up your party and your own Champion's talents to bring to bear countless combinations of strengths and weaknesses against your demonic foes.

Why Should I Support You? What Do I Get Out of It?

Good question. As a backer, you'll get access to more frequent updates as compared to free players. The main reason to support us, though, is because you like what we're doing and are willing to shell out some cash to help make CoC2 the best game it can be. The more support you guys give us, the more art and writing we can commission; eventually, we'll be able to start hiring on people full time to make awesome content for you.

Where Do I Get My Cool Stuff?

We post every build as a downloadable link right here on Patreon!

Fenoxo.com is still the ultimate home for adult interactive fiction, and you can also get your fix over there right in your browser. After you back us here, create an account over there, open your blog profile, go through the process described there for linking up your Patreon and Fenoxo accounts, and you'll start seeing a "Backer Builds" tab on the top of the site. You can find all the sweet, sweet early access content your genitalia desires right in there.

attributes.creation_name: creating Empire of Corruption, a adult-oriented adventure game.
attributes.name: Sitribella
attributes.summary:
About the Game

An hour ago, you were about to be rich beyond your wildest dreams. Then your heist went sideways, and your enemies burned you down. All the way down. You've been left for dead in Harrowgate City, the tarnished crown jewel of the east-coast sprawl, without a penny to your name. The only way to rise up once more, and take revenge on the people responsible for your downfall, is to build an empire from nothing. An empire of corruption.

Empire of Corruption is a free text-based erotic role playing game, where players chart their characters' destiny through a world of lust and crime. It features brothel-simulator and business-management aspects as well as cyberpunk adventure and exploration. While designing the game, three core principles were kept in mind:

Player Comfort: Build the character you want to play, with physical transformations -- from the subtle to the dramatic -- as close as the local cyberware dealer. Toggles will block off extreme content, so you don't have to engage with content you don't care for. You could conceivably play through a ton of Empire of Corruption without having any sex at all. I mean, if you really wanted to. Point is, you've got options.

Player Choice: Fetish-wise, the game is heavily centered around BDSM and corruption. The aim is to provide as many player options, and ways to engage with the erotica, as possible. Will you manage a stable of whores, or peddle your own body on the street? Do you want to hold a slave-tamer's whip, or feel its bite across your tender skin? The choice is yours.

Gameplay and Story Matters: We're here for the smut, but gamers do not live by smut alone. The aim was to create a game that would still work as an RPG and provide a fun experience and an engaging story even if it was rated PG. And then, of course, add mountains of steaming, sultry situations.

Development Status

Empire of Corruption is built in Twine, and currently has over 180,000 words of content.

The current public and free release, Version 9, is available at:

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/posts/93769006

Google Drive: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1IUGFOPR41YDKydRRywij-AWwtpeLyKbH

Mega: https://mega.nz/file/QFtTQK6I#LC0XPSMt7LkPItWGXKjrGI8Ck3o6dyUBAktTrMK-kEM

attributes.creation_name: creating Exclusive Sexy Experience for Adult Gameplayers
attributes.name: RALX Games Productions
attributes.summary:
About Us

Hello and welcome to RALX! We are a dynamic duo of developers who branched out from a major video game company to explore the world of adult game development. Leveraging our extensive experience in the gaming industry, we are now focused on creating engaging and professionally crafted adult games.

Our goal is to combine our gaming expertise with unique adult content, offering players something more than just entertainment. Every project is a step towards achieving this vision, and with your support, we aim to bring these innovative games to life.

Our Official Website: Ralx Games - Our Games License: Accessible Here

Introducing 'Ways of Life': A Fusion of Graphic Adventure and RPG

'Ways of Life' represents the cutting edge in hybrid gaming experiences, artfully blending the narrative depth of a Graphic Adventure with the strategic complexity of RPG mechanics. This game is designed to provide players with unparalleled freedom in decision-making, allowing for a personalized and immersive experience.

At the heart of 'Ways of Life' is an extensive array of adult content, meticulously crafted to integrate seamlessly with the game's rich storyline and interactive gameplay. Our commitment to quality ensures that each aspect of the game contributes to a cohesive and engaging narrative.

Players can expect a dynamic gaming environment, where every choice leads to new paths and possibilities. Whether you're navigating through intricate plots or engaging in lustful gameplay, 'Ways of Life' offers a unique and captivating experience for mature audiences.

Embark on a Mysterious Journey!

Unravel the enigmatic disappearance of the Main Character's father in a thrilling adventure that blends reality with fantasy. 'Ways of Life' sets you on a captivating quest filled with intrigue and unexpected turns.

Find yourself cohabiting with three stunning women, each harboring secrets that could alter your destiny. Among them lies a key to your bloodline's mysterious past, intertwining your fate with a world where witches, demons, and succubi lurk in the shadows.

As you delve deeper, you'll explore a narrative that weaves the real with the surreal, challenging your perceptions at every turn. Discover a rich tapestry of dark histories and hidden truths, where each decision opens new paths and possibilities.

Beyond the main quest, 'Ways of Life' offers a world of interaction and exploration. Secure a job, engage in flirtatious dialogues, and enjoy intimate moments with other characters. Your choices shape your journey, from casual encounters to deep connections.

'Ways of Life' isn't just a game; it's a gateway to a world of mystery, romance, and adventure. Will you uncover the truth about your father and the secrets within your bloodline? Your journey awaits.

A Universe Tailored to Your Curiosity

Our game is an exhilarating playground for all types of players. Whether you seek romance, corruption, or compelling storytelling, there's something here that will captivate your imagination. From earning money to enhancing skills, every turn is a step into a new adventure.

Stunning Visuals Across All Platforms

Experience our game in its full glory with top-tier graphics, whether you're on Windows, Mac OSX, Android, or Web. Our commitment to quality ensures a visually stunning and interactive experience, no matter your platform.

Exclusive Rewards for Our Supporters

Join us as a patron and unlock a realm of exclusive rewards. Your support grants you access to download the game on various platforms and opens the door to a trove of in-game rewards and versions, each more tantalizing than the last. The higher your tier, the richer your experience.

We’re not just building a game; we're crafting a world that grows with your support. Every pledge brings us closer to realizing a vision where every player finds a path that resonates with them.

Become a part of our journey today – your adventure awaits!

Important Security Notice

Please note that this game employs robust protection measures using Patreon's API to ensure exclusive content access for our Patrons. For the complete gaming experience and access to Patron benefits, internet access is required. This allows the game to connect with Patreon's API, which generates a unique code for each Patron to use for login.

Strict Policy Against Unauthorized Access:

We strongly discourage any unauthorized access attempts, hacking, or sharing of restricted content. Such activities are against our community guidelines and will lead to immediate and permanent exclusion from our platform. Our goal is to maintain a secure and fair environment for all players, where the privileges of our Patrons are respected and protected. We trust in the cooperation of all our members to help keep our community safe and enjoyable.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation in keeping our gaming community secure and enjoyable.

Notes:

  • The cohabitating girls are originally meant to be Not related in any way with the Main Character.

  • All adult interactions are consensual.

  • This game, the story and the characters are pure made of fiction: nothing on this is based on real events.

  • All characters in the game have reached their adult legal age.

  • All game content is made in 3D machine generated graphic.

  • We respect People, Players and Patreon Guidelines.

attributes.name: Greetings, Adventurers!
attributes.summary:
Greetings adventurers! Thank you so much for taking time to visit the Greetings, Adventurers! (previously Drunks and Dragons) Patreon page. We have had the pleasure of creating our 5th Edition D&D actual play podcast for years now, and while we absolutely love creating it, we could use your help. The cast of Greetings, Adventurers! includes Nika Howard (Nika_Howard), Jennifer Cheek (jennifercheek), Tim Lanning (timlanning), Mike Bachmann (themikebachmann), and your Dungeon Master: Michael DiMauro (thriftynerd). There are very real costs associated with keeping our podcast going. We need to pay for everything from server space to new equipment to a seemingly endless supply of Bud Light Lime Raz-Ber-Ritas. We also love finding fun ways to give back to our listeners, so if you scroll down you will find all kinds of wonderful rewards. We have rewards for any budget, and every little bit helps. There are plenty of cool things like exclusive campaigns or deep dives on behind the scenes aspects of the show. Additionally, Patreon is the way to access ad-free versions of the podcast.

We are always mixing things up and trying to find new ways to make being a patron a worthwhile endeavor. Our current vision is to deliver fresh and exclusive content to you every several times a month. Currently, you can enjoy: Editing Tales - In this video series, Master Editor David Stewart (David Stewart) takes you on a journey as he explains the subtle science and exact art of podcast editing. Blooper Reel! - Did you know that there is stuff that is actually too silly, weird, or inappropriate to make it into our finished podcasts? We didn't either! Now you can experience these "bloopers" first hand in our monthly series. Tales from the Foaming Tankard - This is a whole psuedo-canonical new series filled with mini-campaigns that dive deeper into the lore of Drunkeros featuring the cast as well as friends from around the ttrpg space. 

Thank you again for checking out our page, and we hope you consider becoming our patron.  - The Greetings, Adventurers! crew

Paperback is an app for iOS that lets you read locally hosted comics/books/manga that you have purchased digitally. It also provides a robust API to allow anyone to interact with the UI The proceeds from Patreon will go towards supporting the development of the app. and the yearly subscription of Apple Development account. Discord (Most Active/Updated): https://discord.paperback.com Twitter: https://twitter.com/paperbackios

attributes.name: Caribdis
attributes.summary:
ETERNUM

You’re moving with your best friend to the city of Kredon, home to some of the best schools and universities in the country, to continue your studies. However, in Kredon, there’s only one thing everyone talks about: ETERNUM—the virtual, hyper-reality MMORPG game released a few years ago that revolutionized the world of technology.

With a neural implant that recreates the five senses, it becomes impossible to distinguish between the game and the real world. Thousands of servers form the network of Eternum: from colorful, magic-filled fantasy worlds to foggy sci-fi cities, no world is beyond reach. Nevertheless, looking beyond the surface, there's a darker side to this pretty facade: black markets, torture, illegal content trafficking, unlawful assemblies, data theft… Eternum follows the rules of no man. For some reason, governments turn a blind eye to this; there’s no regulation and no control. Some say it’s because the game is highly addictive, some say it’s because the market moves millions of dollars daily, some say those in power have been bribed, and others say… there’s something else going on.

And you? What’s your role in this story?

Well... That’s up to you now.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

DISCLAIMER

All the characters depicted in this game are fictional and over the legal age of 18. It doesn't include any illegal or forbidden content according to the Patreon TOS.

Eternum is made with Blender.

Copyright 2024 Caribdis. This item is not authorized for posting on Steam or any other platform other than the official one.
